reviews.review_description: I havent played the whole game (get motion sick) but i can play mixed reality with no issues. Ive tried this and so far its pretty good and shows promise to be great. Hopefully they'll put more options  into the mixed reality mode for people like me. Im looking forward to enjoying this game 😊

This game is totally worth the price! Senseless zombie murder. Fun gun play and able to add flashlight’s, laser, hand grips….
The grab mechanics need to be like this in every VR game!!! Intense moments and even some jump scares here and there. Great fun and highly recommended!￼

Like in Arizona Sunshine games, in this game you will be shooting zombies the entire campaign (so no puzzles, no bosses, no inventory management, no items, and no background story in logs or diaries). I find it a bit more repetitive than AS games and I think it's because the environment feels samey throughout the campaign. Some mechanics like manual reloading, scanning cards, melee, and climbing can feel janky, but they are serviceable. The atmosphere of this game is good, and the graphics and gunplay are decent (though not as good as AS Remake & AS 2). Nothing really stands out, but overall I think it's a decent game if you just want to shoot zombies in VR. If you love a campaign zombie shooter and already played the better ones like RE4, TWDS&S, Propagation Paradise Hotel, Arizona Sunshine Remake, and Arizona Sunshine 2, then this game is a decent pick.

￼ it’s good the name death horizon reloaded is a good name attachments? The guns are pretty good and the multiplayer the fact that you get to fight the boss at the end is really fun with the machine gun. It’s worth it.
￼

If you like zombie walk though killing spree then this is for you. From using guns to bats and even pipe. There’s bombs to set off things to find. It’s an adventure that keeps giving, I’ve played a few hrs so far and haven’t touched the sides with what you have to do. The graphics and game play are very good. I can see big potential in this game as time goes on. I give it 4/5 because when you pick the ax up and try and swing it it don’t seem real enough to me. But other than that top game.

reviews.review_title: What happened to the rest of the game?
reviews.review_description:
I really like(d) this game, but what happen to the rest? Wasn't there supposed to be another part to the story? I'm pretty sure that's what I remember. It was left unfinished? 
They made that cyberfusion game, and this one came out in 2019. So where is the ending? The game is/was pretty popular. Finishing it should be a money maker. It doesn't have to be free. Is it going to be finished, or is this it?
On the mixed reality when are you going to change the sky from Orange to something that's worth looking at I don't understand the whole orange sky thing
It's meh , short game should be cheaper would pay maybe 5 bucks  shouldn't be 15,   3 stars

My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed opportunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I don't see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I received a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.
I'm falling through the loading stage and theirs nothing that can be done about it

This game is awesome . Excellent graphics and gameplay. My only issue is when I try to play co-op . It never loads . I have q1. Q2 and q3 . It never loads on any of the headsets or if I try to create a co-op myself . That does not work. If I play the game in single player mode. It plays fine. I would still rate this game 10 out of 10. As it is excellent to play.

It is a solid Zombie game for VR, a good progression of levels from start to finish, adds more variety of types of zombies, some faster, some slower that explode, some larger with more hot points, zombie dogs also, all of which you first discover them running at you the first time add a new element of fear until you get the hang of them. My only issue that I've personally run into, I make the campaign to 88% and have been able to finish the story to the end 3 times. Every time I get there my character ends up being stuck and I cannot use my controllers to select credits or walk to the helicopter at the end, resulting in me having to exit the game and reload. When I reload I am back to 88% I still got the achievements, but it is annoying knowing I completed it 3 times and did not actually fully get that 100%

Apart from that issue, it's an enjoyable zombie game that lasted me probably around 10 hours in total gameplay over several weeks.
Multiplayer is broken for me
There are no people online on The multiplayer in the US. I'm pretty sure every review is bots

Solid zombie game for Quest. The gamplay is enjoyable, VR implementation works as it should and there's enough content to keep you busy. Does what a good VR zombie game should do without any major issues. A good choice if you like the genre.
Why when you get the game you cant do multiplayeplayer.😭

I first tried the Cyberpunk version of the game and it instantly pulled me in. After that I went back to play the original, and honestly, I enjoyed both so much more than I expected. Now I'm really hoping there's a new game coming in the Death Horizon series - I'd jump into it day one.
Super fun to play in VR and always feels engaging. It’s one of those games I like jumping into whenever I have time.

I love this game great mixed reality style zombie shooter. learning to use the weapons was challenging and fun.
The setup was easy took a second to fiqure out how to do it but after that I had no problems.
This game is great, a lot of moving around. Graphics are good and the game just is great.

Regards,
Dream Dev Studio.

reviews.review_title: It’s good, but needs some polishing
reviews.review_description:
The story and general gameplay loop is perfectly fine. However, there are some very real QOL things that absolutely need to be addressed.

1. Melee weapons are wonky at best. They feel wiggly and awkward to use, ultimately cause them get cast to the side.

2.Ammo in game is plentiful until you get to the late game where you’re playing as Em, then it’s nigh impossible to come by.

3.The campaign feels and behaves like it was built specifically with duos in mind. Making playing the game solo a frustrating experience in late game because you just can’t carry enough of anything to make it through first try.

4.The rifles (AR-15 and SCAR-H) are cumbersome, unwieldy and feel way underpowered. An AR-15 and SCAR-H should reliably drop regular/weak zombies with a single shot to the head, and it’s underwhelming that they don’t.

5.Loot despawns pretty regularly. I just had an experience where I was at the mounted minigun part of the game and literally all of the ammo cans for the mounted gun despawned when I went into the nearby secret room. I came back out and all the ammo was gone I had back out to the main menu and reload to fix it. 

6.The health injector should have its own unique spot instead of taking up a holster. In late game, it tends to be extremely annoying having to build my whole load out around wanting to carry the health injector. It’s also a mechanic that should be introduced from level 1 and not halfway through the game. It completely changed the way I had to approach every single level afterwards all because the health mechanics suddenly changed.

7.The stun guns are cool but ultimately useless. They great when you’re dealing with the giant zombie, but they’re no where dangerous enough to justify giving up my primary or my secondary while also carrying a health injector. But realistically, the fact that they can stun the big guy and that you’re essentially forced to choose between stun weapon or health injector puts the player in a very frustrating position. Stun the big guy and actually he able to do stuff for longer than 5 seconds or be able to heal… not exactly a fair choice for the player in what is ultimately just a zombie shooter.

8.The mounted minigun is just a little too tall. I’m 5’6” (yes, I’m on the short side) and have to stand on my toes just to see over it.

9.I personally would love to see more interactive things in the game. I love that consoles and keyboards make typing sounds when tap your hands against them and I love the keycard and security bypassing mechanics. I just wish that there were more grab-able objects instead only being able to push them around. I think it’d really help with immersion.

Other than those issues, the game is fantastic. I love the hidden rooms, the atmosphere and level designs are immersive and interesting. The story is compelling once you get into it. And I’ve had some great moments playing with my friends. I just think there are some QOL things that would really propel the game into mass popularity on the Quest

developer_response.body:

Your feedback is very important to us, and we truly appreciate the time you took to share your experience.

Regards,

reviews.review_description: Well worth your time, great zombie action, lots of secrets, upgrades, weapons, and multiple ways to accomplish goals.  I prefer the two pistol/guns akimbo method, but starting to enjoy the shotgun more and more.  If you have space, use it, really move around and enjoy yourself, you will get so much out of this game.  I have played sitting on the couch as well, and other than being short, it’s possible.

Thanks for the kind words — we're glad you're enjoying the action, weapons, and different playstyles. 

Whether you're moving around or playing from the couch, we’re happy it works for you!

Feel free to reach out anytime at info@dream-dev.com.

reviews.review_description: I just purchased this game last night.  I sent one to a friend for a gift because it said that you can play between one and four players. you cannot play duo on this game please address this?￼ or can I have my refund for the game that I purchased for this

developer_response.body:
Hi deedeebarber55,

Thanks for your message.

Death Horizon: Reloaded does support multiplayer (1–4 players), but to play in Duo mode, both players need to:

1. Have the game installed and updated to the latest version.

2. Be connected to the internet.

3. Go to the Multiplayer section from the main menu and either create a room or join your friend’s room.

If you're having trouble connecting, feel free to reach out to us at info@dream-dev.com — we’ll help you set everything up.

We hope this helps, and once everything is set up, you'll be able to enjoy the game together!

Once you get the connection working, we’d really appreciate it if you could take a moment to update your review — it means a lot to us.

Best regards,
Dream Dev Team

reviews.review_description: Garbage game feel like playing 2d

developer_response.body:
Hi Alexak47,

Thanks for your feedback. Just to clarify — Death Horizon: Reloaded is a full 3D VR shooter, with real-time 3D environments, depth, and spatial interactions. 

In technical terms, a 2D game uses flat graphics on an X and Y axis, while a 3D game like ours includes depth (Z axis), volumetric movement, and fully modeled environments.

Could you let us know what exactly felt "2D" to you? Feel free to email us at info@dream-dev.com — we’d really appreciate the details.

Thank you.

Regards,
Dream Dev Studio.

reviews.review_description:
First let me say, the game is fun and for some reasons brings back the feeling of playing GoldenEye on the N64 many years ago. It's a simplistic but very fun game to play.The settings allowed for some good tweaking, ie, having adjusted the aim +2 points from the default , I had no problems headshotting enemies even at distance. I do feel tho, that the turn speed could be increased a bit more for snappier smooth turning. 
Unfortunately for me I have a quite severe fear of heights and on one section involving a chasm you have to cross ,it stopped me dead in my tracks, I couldn't continue beyond that point. Couldn't get a refund as I had played slightly longer than two hours to get to that point lol.

developer_response.body:
Hi Bryghtblade!

Thank you for your detailed feedback! We're really happy to hear that the game brings back some nostalgic GoldenEye vibes. 

It's great to know that the aiming adjustments worked well for you. 

We’ll take your suggestion about turn speed into consideration for future updates.

We totally understand that VR height experiences can be intense, especially for players with a fear of heights. While there’s no way to skip sections at the moment, we’ll keep accessibility options in mind for future improvements.

Also, exciting news! In a few weeks, we’re launching a big update with a new Horde Mode for 1-4 players, so there will be even more ways to enjoy the game.

Thanks again for playing, and we appreciate your feedback!

reviews.review_description:
Great game if you like zombies and high adrenaline levels :D

Remember to hold the machine gun with both hands because the recoil is quite high. I recommend it, it's one of the best VR games.

developer_response.body:
Hi KarusUK!

Thank you so much for your awesome review! We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the high-adrenaline zombie action! And yes, that machine gun recoil can be intense—great tip for new players!

We're also working on new updates, and in a few weeks, we'll be releasing a huge update featuring a new Horde Mode for 1-4 players. We hope you'll love it!

Thanks again for your support, and have fun surviving the zombie apocalypse!

reviews.review_description: I expected this to be a half baked on rails shooter going by the store page and wow was i wrong. While i dont have much playtime in this game it feels like a non rails house of the dead built for vr and i love it. Guns and aiming feels great and you never feel safe even in the safe zones. Game looks pretty decent too. If you like zombie shooters this is a no brainer.

reviews.review_description: I used to love this game. I just got the new updated version and I’m stuck in the first room. There is no key. It’s past my two weeks so I can’t get a refund. This is ridiculous. I even gifted this to a friend and now I’m embarrassed

developer_response.body:
Hi SSTRAKER,

Thank you for reaching out and letting us know about the issue you’re facing. We’re sorry to hear that you’re stuck in the first room. Depending on your game progress and version, there should be a key in or near the starting area. However, if you’re certain it’s missing, please let us know a few more details—like which platform you’re on and whether you’ve tried verifying or reinstalling the game—so we can investigate further.

We understand it’s frustrating to be stuck and unable to get a refund. If you purchased the game outside of the standard refund window, please still reach out to our support team at info@dream-dev.com. We can’t promise refunds beyond store policies, but we’ll be happy to assist you or work out another solution.

Thank you again for the feedback. We truly appreciate your previous support and for sharing the game with a friend. We want to make things right and will do our best to get you past that first room and back to enjoying the game! If you have any additional concerns, feel free to contact us directly.

Best regards,
Dream Dev Studio.

reviews.review_description:
I didn't know I would love a zombie game, but here I am, compelled to write a review!  
This is a strategic game using a multitude of weapons that you can pick up along the way and, of course, an array of guns.  You are in control over where you walk and hide or climb to.  It's not needlessly complicated either.   The campaign is somewhat story driven with different levels of difficulty to play.  I am currently on easy.
Also, the graphics are great!  All ages would like this game.

developer_response.body:
Hi CarolF1428,

Thank you for your lovely review! We're thrilled to hear that our game turned you into a zombie game fan. 😊 

If you have any questions or suggestions while you play, feel free to reach out to us at info@dream-dev.com. Happy gaming, and good luck with the campaign!

Best,
Dream Dev Studio

reviews.review_title: A must have zombie game! Quest 3 update*
reviews.review_description:
* Quest3 update:
This game is so much better on quest 3 and the mixed reality is freakin awesome.

I freakin love this game it's just intense zombie action all the way. So freakin cool, weapon choices are ace, zombies are scary, big variety of bad dudes, dogs are horrible but so cool too! Played loads on solo and cant wait to get some multiplayer action in I can imagine its gonna be even more fun! Love the way ypu can climb about and hang one handed while blasting a corpse up with a desert eagle hand piece. Yep brilliant and soooo much fun! A must have in all collections! even at full price worth every penny.

developer_response.body:
Hi jonsey0917,

Thank you for your enthusiastic review!

We’re thrilled to hear that you’re enjoying DH: Reloaded on Quest 3, and that the mixed reality mode adds to the excitement!

We can’t wait for you to dive into the multiplayer—it’s sure to add even more fun!

We’ve also prepared some exciting surprises in the upcoming updates, so stay tuned!

If you have any feedback or suggestions, feel free to reach out at info@dream-dev.com.

Best regards,
Dream Dev Studio

reviews.review_title: With the latest update, it's better.
reviews.review_description:
Edited review/updated

So, I've been playing and testing this game out since it first got released. Over this time, this game has had its issues, to say the least. There have been numerous bugs, glitches, and stability issues that plagued this game. It's still a great game, but there are issues that could be fixed. With the latest update(August 30th, 2023), I am happy to report that this game has changed dramatically. The dev team has worked effortlessly to get FREE updates out through the life of the title, which includes new content to keep the players coming back to this fantastic zombie shooter. The latest update fixed a lot of the issues I was facing in terms of bugs and glitches. The game now feels buttery smooth with improved frame rates, I haven't had any issues with slowness or frame drops. The melee/combat system has improved drastically. The melee weapons feel good to bash zombies over the head with. They feel effective, and they hit hard. No more is there that stupid wobbling effect on melee weapons.(Thank god) The dev team added a sit-down mode, the ability to customize/change the angle of the gun, relative to how it is sitting in your hand in-game, Improved frame rates and countless other quality of life improvements. This game now is the best it's ever felt since. Again, this comming from someone who has been playing since launch. We are coming to the end of the life cycle of this game, but there is absolutely no reason why you shouldn't pick this title up to play and enjoy this unique zombie shooter. It is still one of the best shooters on Quest platforms. A classic shooter to pick up solo or with a friend in co-op and shoot and climb your way out of the facility infested with mutated zombies and other creatures. When you're done with story, don't forget to try out the special challenges like "deep dark dare" which is being able to play the game in complete darkness with just a flashlight. That is where this game really shines!.

Edition 6/8/2024

The devs have added a new mixed reality mode for Quest 2 and 3 owners. 

In addition, the Devs have included a new experimental section. For the small price of $5 or so, it includes cheat codes for single player campaign. So now you can play any part of the game you want at your choice. You have infinite ammo, infinite health. You opt to put in every single gun and attachment, every melee weapon, and choose what you want to use. You can also choose to have different color keycards or the master keycard that unlocks every door. They've also added one hit mode, which zombies will die to one hit with melee weapons and super jump mode as cheat codes.

Edited 11/14/2024

Devs have worked their magic and brought Quest 3 and Quest 3s users another Quest 3 optimization update, which includes the following.

⚡️ Death Horizon: Reloaded | Enhanced for Meta Quest 3 & 3S – New Visuals, Dynamic Shadows, and Flamethrower!
🧟 Dynamic shadows for enemies
🦾 Texture improvements
⚡️ Enhanced lighting
🚨 Dynamic lighting introduced in certain game level areas
🔥 Flamethrower added

developer_response.body:
Hi BKLYNZF1N3ST718,

Thank you for supporting Death Horizon: Reloaded from the very beginning and for taking the time to update your review along the way!

Your feedback motivates us to keep pushing boundaries, and we’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the updates.

If you have any questions, suggestions, or ideas, feel free to reach out to us at info@dream-dev.com.

Best regards,
The Dream Dev Studio Team

reviews.review_description:
I have picked up every early quest zombie shooter and must say, having had lower expectations here, it really blew me away. 
Guns are really super fun to shoot and serious thought has gone into the 2 handed weapons - it feels better than in any VR game I've personally played. Maximum props to the devs for that - I don't want to squint down iron sights on a rifle, waving my front hand around trying to line the gun up, I just want to hold them in front of one side and stomp around blasting like Schwarzenegger. The spread on the shotgun (which you pump between shots) and the lazer on the AR work amazingly, it just feels like it should. No toilet roll tube controller holders needed!
The enemy placement leads to tension at all times, till you learn to sideways walk down the halls (good luck jumpscaring me now!). 
All in all the title is between the arcadey dual strike & the more traditional horror fps like Arizona sunshine. It's most like killing floor or COD zombies in feel to me, with its large amount of zombies. It's really action oriented.
It also has really good, functional climbing added in, which I love to see. 
On the downside, it has the same problems all quest zombie games have - prepare to dome the same 6 or so zombies over again.
For the low price, you get so much cool stuff here.
As most reviews compare this to Arizona sunshine, let me add this:AZ has a massive amount of extra content and is more like a traditional game. It's less action-y. I really loved both games, but think the prices for both are fair and reflect how much game you get. For me AZ just edges it in shooting (I love its pistols), here, man is shooting fun too.
The devs are adding in more content, co-op across platforms would be so cool.
All in all well done devs, here's hoping we see more of your work on here in the future! And no crunching too.
I've upgraded the review because when do you ever get a dev that actually listens to what players say?
Update 2024: this game has literally just gotten better over the years: more content, more fixes. I tried the MR mode and it’s both terrifying and fun - a great addition to an already fantastic game <3

developer_response.body:
Hi ludanto1312,

Thank you so much for your detailed and thoughtful review, and for revisiting it with the update! We’re thrilled to hear how much you've enjoyed the game over time.

We’re glad that you liked the MR mode.

We continue to support the game and have a few exciting updates planned, so stay tuned! If you have any ideas or suggestions for improving the game, please don’t hesitate to write to us at info@dream-dev.com.

Best regards,
Dream Dev Studio

We appreciate your feedback. If you have any questions or suggestions on how we can improve the game, feel free to contact us at info@dream-dev.com.

Regards,
Dream Dev Studio

reviews.review_title: So close to being a classic
reviews.review_description:
This is like the zombie experience you dreamed of having as a kid (unless you were scared of zombies, then this is the Zombie nightmare you dreamed of as a kid).

The game is well paced, split into fun intense sections where you shoot, hit, and run away from zombies to get to the next safe point. The weapons are fantastic, the upgrades actually make a huge difference to the weapons and the gameplay, and reloading mechanics (if you put it to manual) just add more intensity to the game…

You feel like an 80’s action hero as you stand before a locked door listening to all the zombies moving around and groaning whilst you quickly pull out each of your weapons to cast away your empty clips, load up a fresh one, cocking your gun and say to your team mate “let’s do this!”

Speaking of team mate. You can play this game solo, but online with a good friend elevates everything to a whole new level, this is clearly the way to play a game such as this. 

Unfortunately, there are a few thorns to this game. There are quite a few bugs that will crash your game, halt your progress, or just unexpectedly kill you and/or your team mate. I would love to hear what the developers roadmap is for this game as these bugs could probably be fixed if focused on. But perhaps they are working on something new and more exciting. As with everything they have learnt in creating this game I can’t wait to see what future projects they have in store for us!

developer_response.body:
Hi Thundercato,

Thank you so much for your detailed and thoughtful review!

We’re thrilled that you’re enjoying the game. Your feedback about the pacing, weapons, and intensity is much appreciated.

We are actively working on new updates with additional functionality and some bug fixes.

Thanks again for your support, and stay tuned!

Regards,
Dream Dev Studio.

reviews.review_description: This game is sooo much fun. The only issue is not being able to save the game during team play. If it would at least save at the checkpoints, that would be great. Our headsets run out of batteries, and we lose all of our progress and the ammo we have accumulated up to that point. Also, we can not get the microphones to work no matter what we try. They are enabled, but they don't work. If a fix for this could be added to the settings, that would be great as well. Thankfully, we are in the same house, so we just stay where we can hear each other, but we won't be able to play with people outside our home. All that aside, the game is still a lot of fun, and we really enjoy it. It would be a five-star game with those fixes.

developer_response.body:
Hi Sunflowerz1,

Thank you for your review and for sharing your experience with the game!

We’re glad to hear you're having fun, but we understand the frustrations with saving progress during team play and the microphone issues. Both of these are important, and we’ll look into addressing them in future updates.

Thank you for your patience and support, and we hope to make your gaming experience even better soon!

Best regards,
Dream Dev Studio

reviews.review_description:
https://bio   .link/xylem_1

This game is amazing. If you like zombies and horror, this is the game for you. It is good for hardcore and casual players alike. The game offers co-op, multiplayer, and solo player. If you want a thrilling, adrenaline rush packed experience, this is the game. My first time playing was nerve wracking and adrenaline pumping. It offers different guns, levels, enemies, and difficulties depending on how you like to play. There are challenges as well if you want to try them out for a different

Downloaded this last night and thought I would have a quick twenty minutes to see what it was like... next thing I know I get a low battery alert on my headset, so much fun, great weapons and plenty of zombies to take down plus remember to check rear cos those zombies come at you from everywhere 😂 highly recommend this game
